title: broomva agent task — v1
description: Canonical task specification consumed by `broomva agent run` (Phase B). Mirrors the Agent Invocation Contract (AC-1..AC-6) from docs/specs/2026-05-18-broomva-cli-agent-chat-pipeline.md §3.2. The CLI validates a YAML/JSON task spec against this schema BEFORE submitting to lifed; invalid specs are rejected with the collected ValidationErrors, never sent to the substrate.

name.description: Human-readable task name. Surfaced in `agent list` + `agent get` output. Not used as an identifier by lifed (run_id is the ULID, server-issued).

description.description: Optional free-form prose describing what the task does.

prompt.description: The user-supplied prompt the agent receives at run start.

variables.description: Free-form variable bag interpolated into the prompt server-side. Schema is intentionally open — lifed validates the variable types when present.

backend.description: InferenceBackend identifier (e.g. `claude-opus-4-7`). Resolved server-side; client-side this is a free-form string. If unset, lifed picks the user's default.

tools.description: Allowed tool names. Empty / omitted ⇒ no tools.

max_cost_usd.description: Client- and server-side enforced cost ceiling. Client refuses to submit if the estimated cost exceeds this value; lifed enforces the running budget per tool call via Wallet.Transfer simulation (Spec D).

timeout_seconds.description: Per-step wall-clock cap. Default is server-decided (typically 600s).

on_timeout.description: Behaviour when `timeout_seconds` is exceeded. `fail` aborts; `partial-output` returns whatever the model has produced; `retry` restarts the step (lifed enforces a saga-level max of 3 retries unless overridden).

schema.description: Optional JSON Schema (any draft — verbatim handed to the output validator) for the task's output. Client validates the run's final output against this AFTER the run completes; mismatches log a verdict in run metadata.yaml.

save_to.description: Override the default output file location. Supports `{run_id}` interpolation. Default: `~/.broomva/runs/{run_id}/output.json`.
